chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-697 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection No.20. 2. For orders on Misc. No.3341/2025. 3. For orders on Misc. No.3342/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025. Mr. Shahid Hussain, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Kabeer Ahmed, learned counsel for the Petitioner, and requests for an adjournment on the ground that the latter is indisposed. A perusal of the Court file reflects that this matter has been pending since 10.02.2024 without having been properly pursued with Counsel for the Petitioner having been earlier directed to place on record the map of society/colony showing the particular plot to have been reserved for a Mosque, but the same has also not been done as yet. Even otherwise, the Petition seeks suspension of the Notice dated 23.01.2024 issued under the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act 2010, and the appropriate course of action for the Petitioner would be to approach the concerned Anti-Encroachment Tribunal. That being so, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived. The same stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith the pending miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
